ERROR.TITLE: Error
ERROR.DESC: Please provide a valid client ID in the URL

FOOTER.PARTNER: {{ provider }} is an Ogulo authorized partner.
FOOTER.SECURE: The connection is established securely and encrypted.

ONBOARDING CONNECT.CONNECT ERROR 1: Unfortunately, a connection is not possible because company SSO is enforced for your company.
ONBOARDING CONNECT.CONNECT ERROR 2: Unfortunately, a connection is not possible because compay SSO is not configured for your company.
ONBOARDING CONNECT.DESCRIPTION: Please log in once with your existing Ogulo account to establish the link.
ONBOARDING CONNECT.HEADLINE: Link existing Ogulo account

ONBOARDING ERRORS.DEFAULT: An error occurred while logging in with the Schwarz Gruppe SSO.
ONBOARDING ERRORS.EMAIL NOT FOUND DESC: The email has not yet been deposited with us.
ONBOARDING ERRORS.INVALID SCHWARZ ACCESS TOKEN: Unfortunately, you do not have the necessary rights to use the Ogulo account.
ONBOARDING ERRORS.INVALID SCHWARZ USER INFOS: No valid information has been provided for the user.
ONBOARDING ERRORS.LOGIN FAILED DESC: Email address or password are incorrect. Please check your inputs.
ONBOARDING ERRORS.MAXIMUM TEAM CONTINGENT: You have reached your maximum broker quota.
ONBOARDING ERRORS.MAXIMUM TEAM CONTINGENT DESC: We're sorry, but you have reached your maximum quota. Please upgrade your account to increase your quota or contact your admin. You can still log in with an existing Ogulo account.
ONBOARDING ERRORS.NO SCHWARZ EMPLOYEE: The user can not be found.
ONBOARDING ERRORS.ONOFFICE ERROR DESC: Your API key did not have enough permissions to perform the synchronization with OnOffice. Please contact OnOffice support.
ONBOARDING ERRORS.ONOFFICE SIGNATURE DESC: The OnOffice signature verification failed. Please try again or contact support.
ONBOARDING ERRORS.SSO LOGIN FAILED DESC: You have not registered with us yet via SSO or linked your account.
ONBOARDING ERRORS.USER NOT FOUND DESC: You have not registered with us yet.
ONBOARDING ERRORS.UNKNOWN DESC: An unknown error has occurred. Please reload the page and try again.

ONBOARDING LOGIN.PASSWORD RESET SUCCESS: Your password has been reset and sent to your email address. Please check your mailbox.

ONOFFICE.FORGOT PASSWORD DIALOG: Please enter your email here. You will receive an email from us to reset your password.
ONOFFICE.LOGIN ONCE: Please log in once with your existing Ogulo account to create the link.
ONOFFICE.PASSWORD SENT: Your password has been reset. Please check your mailbox.
